title: RPG BattleGear
description: mod that aims to add some awesome new armors for 1.21!
body:
### ![](https://i.imgur.com/vrnS8Rz.png)    **Embark on an epic journey of valor, mysticism, and ancient powers with the RPG Battlegear mod for Minecraft!** This mod introduces **five unique armor sets**, each with its own special abilities to enhance your gameplay and provide powerful buffs. To unlock the full potential of these armors, players must craft the mystical **Infusion Altar**, which allows for the infusion of rare items to create these legendary gear pieces. *** #### **Weapons!:** * 14 AWESOME! Weapons! USE better combat for a better experience! Some with animated textures! ![gif](https://i.imgur.com/UL5IJIv.gif) #### **Armor Sets:** 1. **Crusader Armor** - Inspired by the knights of old, the Crusader set offers powerful physical defense and increased melee combat capabilities. Perfect for those who prefer to charge headfirst into battle. 2. **Mystic Armor** - Harness the arcane forces with the Mystic set, granting enhanced mana regeneration and protection against magical attacks. Ideal for spellcasters and players who rely on mystical powers. 3. **Templar Armor** - A set blessed with holy powers, the Templar armor grants increased resistance to dark magic and empowers the wearer with divine strength. The perfect choice for those who walk the righteous path. 4. **Guardian Armor** - Protect yourself and your allies with the Guardian set. This armor provides enhanced durability and grants bonus protection in the form of shield-like abilities, making it perfect for tanking heavy hits. 5. **Seraphim Armor** - Channel the divine with the Seraphim set, offering increased agility, health regeneration, and the power of flight for short bursts. The ultimate choice for those who seek mobility and divine intervention. 6. **Hellforged** - 7. **Dreadlord** - 8. **Sovereign** - *** #### **Special Crafting Materials:** To craft these powerful armor sets, you'll need to gather **rare items** and **infuse them** using the Infusion Altar: - **JEI/EMI Supported** ![altar](https://i.imgur.com/BTK0ZNs.png)

  * **Sacred Gem**: A rare gemstone infused with divine power. * **Ancient Core**: A relic from a lost era, holding immense energy. * **Storm Core**: A relic from a lost era, holding immense energy. * **Soul Core**: A relic from a lost era, holding immense energy. * **Mystic Essence**: The essence of magic itself, extracted from the deepest parts of the world. * **Templar Emblem**: A symbol of unwavering faith, blessed by the Templars. * **Guardian Heart**: The heart of a mighty guardian, said to hold life-preserving magic. * And more.. *** [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/PixelDreamStudios/SPEC_PixelDreamStudios_Promo.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/PixelDream)
